summary: Created MPI-74 from brainstorm session. Per-model engine routing (hybrid local image + cloud video, one project). Blocked on MPI-64. Research note captured at research/hybrid-engine-routing.md; two-instance alternative evaluated and rejected (project split).
Fixed invalid maturity: backlog -> idea (todo column requires idea|planned). Removed non-schema depends_on field; MPI-64 dependency now in status (blocked-on-MPI-64) + description.
Repair: invalid status blocked-on-MPI-64 -> active (MPI-64 dependency stays in description; status is not a freeform blocking field).

Repair: completed partial links to full 8-key set (brief/plan/checklist/validation/files/events/handoffs/research) so the board renders the TASK WORKSPACE panel. Partial links = empty/broken-looking card.
Repair: moved long-form description (738 chars) to brief.md; description now a 1-line summary per schema (description = short card summary, long-form belongs in brief.md).
Moved MPI-74 from To do to To do.

note: Approved: narrowed scope to per-gen Run-locally toggle; starting Phase 1 (dispatch spine).

summary: Phase 6 (true cloud+local concurrency) shipped + live-verified on a connected Pod; committed 47d2cdb. Closes MPI-74.
